title: aconitum noveboracense
intro: Aconitum noveboracense, also known as New York aconitum or monk's hood, is a perennial plant in the Aconitum genus. The medicinal properties of Aconitum noveboracense lie in its roots, which contain aconitine, a toxic alkaloid with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, making it useful in the treatment of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots of Aconitum noveboracense are typically dried and used in tinctures, infusions, or as a powder, although caution is advised due to its toxicity.
